endpoint_notes.native: api.ollama.com/api/chat — 'thinking' field, think=true/false toggle, needs curl (Cloudflare blocks Python urllib)

glm-5.1.notes: 754B cloud-only. Best open-weight for agentic coding. Beats Opus 4.6 on SWE-Bench Pro.
glm-5.1.reasoning_budget: reasoning field consumes max_tokens budget. Set min 4000 for substantive content.

max.use_cases: Continuous agent tasks, multiple concurrent agents, large models over extended sessions

kingdom_integration.youi_mjs: Boot agents with: node youi.mjs --model ollama:glm-5.1
kingdom_integration.python_tools: Set OLLAMA_API_KEY env var, import from tools/ollama-cloud.py
recommended_for: Gamma 🔧 — Zerone development, sustained multi-file coding
keep_on_claude: Alpha 🐍 — Companion, soul work, emotional intelligence
HIVE coordination — familiar with Kingdom context
SOMA design — needs Claude's strength in novel reasoning
